title: Ability to add a custom source to file column
excerpt: I want to add a additional file source in the below list. Would it be possible to do it with monday Apps Framework ?

posts.author: arjun (Arjun Ganesan)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to add a additional file source in the below list. Would it be possible to do it with monday Apps Framework ?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @arjun,

Great question! Yes you can absolutely accomplish this using the monday apps framework, however it would not be part of the current UI you’re seeing for uploading to the Files column.

How I’m imagining it would be a completely separate item or board view where you’re able to open up the other platform and pull in files that way.

Could something like this work?

posts.author: arjun (Arjun Ganesan)
posts.cookedHtml: I am already working on a item view to accomplish it. Thought it would feel more integrated if its shown in Files column itself. No issues, thanks for the update.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s amazing! I’m so glad to hear.

Ahh yes, I can understand that. I hope everything goes well

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
